From Batuu to the Red Carpet: Disneyland Cast Member Celebrates ‘The Mandalorian and Grogu’

As excitement builds for the release of Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu on May 22, lifelong Star Wars fan and Disneyland Resort cast member, Jennifer Baillere, recently experienced a dream come true when she was surprised with an invitation to attend the film’s world premiere. Drinks, Mugs, and More at Trader Sam’s Enchanted Tiki Bar at Disneyland Resort

Wake up, it’s showtime at Trader Sam’s Enchanted Tiki Bar! Tucked away at the Disneyland Hotel inside the Disneyland Resort, this lively hideaway has become a destination all on its own, where every visit feels like stepping into an ongoing story filled with adventure, humor, unexpected surprises, and many of the puns you’ve come to
